phrases: He who refreshes page 47 times will not make email arrive faster.
The Wi-Fi password you seek is written on the bottom of the router.
A watched download bar never reaches 100%.
Ctrl+Z cannot undo what you said at the family dinner.
You will step on Lego in the dark. This is certain.
The meeting could have been an email, but destiny had other plans.
Your rubber duck already knows the answer.
One does not simply deploy on Friday and have a peaceful weekend.
The snack you want is behind the snack you settled for.
Fortune favors the one who clears the cache.
He who names variable "temp2_final_FINAL" will inherit great confusion.
The loading screen is a portal to self-reflection.
Your future is bright. Turn down your screen brightness.
A nap taken in secret is twice as refreshing.
The bug you cannot find is on line 1.
Inbox zero is a myth, like the dragon — magnificent, never real.
Do not bite the hand that holds the aux cord.
You will say "just five more minutes" seven more times tonight.
The autocorrect was wrong. You were also wrong. Balance is restored.
Great power comes to those who remember to save their work.
Your tab hoarding is a cry for help the universe has acknowledged.
They laughed at your idea. They will ask for the WiFi password at your mansion.
Thou shalt not send the meme without reading the full thread first.
The passive-aggressive "per my last email" shall set you free.
A silent phone at 3am is either peace or catastrophe — flip the coin.
He who replies "K" plants seeds of chaos.
The answer is yes, you did leave the stove on.
Your main character moment is buffering. Please wait.
Not all who wander are lost — some are just on the wrong subway line.
The skeleton inside you has been there all along, waiting.
Touch grass, then return — the internet will still be broken.
You are one unsubscribe button away from enlightenment.
The promotion goes to he who learns to look busy during video calls.
Hydrate or diedrate — the ancestors have spoken.
Your villain origin story begins with a full parking lot.
The forbidden nap shall find you during the important meeting.
Fear not the dark mode — fear the one who still uses light mode at midnight.
Good things come to those who mute the group chat.
The plot twist is that you were the red flag.
He who screenshots without sending lives in fear forever.
A new notification will arrive the moment you find focus.
The comment section is not a place for growth. Leave.
Your roman empire is a TV show you've already watched four times.
To gaslight the printer is to gaslight yourself.
The universe is rooting for you, but it also finds you a little funny.
An unsent draft is a ghost that haunts only you.
He who doomscrolls at midnight shall receive exactly what he deserves.
The password was "password" all along.
You will achieve great things immediately after this episode.
The fortune you needed was the sleep you skipped to read this.
